## ASML's indispensability in AI-era chipmaking reexamined amid volatility

ASML's monopoly on EUV is the clearest single-point-of-control in the AI semiconductor supply chain; thesis-review coverage in a volatile tape signals the market is stress-testing whether that moat is priced in or whether any crack in semiconductor cycle momentum justifies a re-rating.

- A thesis review asks whether ASML (ENXTAM:ASML) remains the indispensable link in advanced chipmaking as AI-era capital expenditure accelerates.
- The framing covers both ASML's competitive moat and the volatility characteristics of the stock.
- No new event, customer announcement, or guidance change is reported; this is analytical reassessment coverage.
- Medium classifier confidence on lithography roadmap and AI infrastructure capex themes.
